fixture: 029_update_then_select

statement 1:
  sql:
    CREATE TABLE ledger (id INTEGER NOT NULL, balance INTEGER NOT NULL)
  result:
    ok
    rows_affected: 0

statement 2:
  sql:
    INSERT INTO ledger VALUES (1, 1000)
  result:
    ok
    rows_affected: 1

statement 3:
  sql:
    INSERT INTO ledger VALUES (2, 2000)
  result:
    ok
    rows_affected: 1

statement 4:
  sql:
    UPDATE ledger SET balance = 1500 WHERE id = 1
  result:
    ok
    rows_affected: 1

statement 5:
  sql:
    SELECT id, balance FROM ledger
  result:
    query
    columns:
      [0] id INTEGER NOT NULL
      [1] balance INTEGER NOT NULL
    rows:
      [0] 1 | 1500
      [1] 2 | 2000
